entity.summary: Digital-asset exchange founded in 2018 and presented in official corporate materials as based in Seychelles, with its Liechtenstein entity obtaining a TVTG registration milestone in April 2023.
entity.notes: The previous United Arab Emirates origin was not retained because later official corporate materials identify Victoria, Seychelles, while the regulated European entity is registered in Liechtenstein. The 2018 launch remains a year-level marker.

expected.summary: United Arab Emirates-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the BTSE brand.

changes.summary: Digital-asset exchange founded in 2018 and presented in official corporate materials as based in Seychelles, with its Liechtenstein entity obtaining a TVTG registration milestone in April 2023.
changes.notes: The previous United Arab Emirates origin was not retained because later official corporate materials identify Victoria, Seychelles, while the regulated European entity is registered in Liechtenstein. The 2018 launch remains a year-level marker.

events.title: BTSE was founded in 2018
events.description: The exchange was founded in 2018 as a digital-asset exchange and derivatives platform using a custom-built matching engine.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Liechtenstein entity obtained TVTG registration subject to a condition precedent
events.description: The exchange announced that its Liechtenstein entity had obtained approval for registration as a Trustworthy Technology Exchange Service Provider under the TVTG, subject to a condition precedent.
events.notes: This is a regional legal-entity regulatory milestone and does not imply that every service globally is regulated by the Liechtenstein FMA.

evidence.title: Exchange brings AAVE token to its users
evidence.notes: The official article describes the exchange as established in 2018 and based in Seychelles.

evidence.title: Exchange announces strategic partnership with Wootrade
evidence.notes: The official article states that the exchange was founded in 2018.

evidence.title: Exchange gains virtual-asset-services registration in Liechtenstein
evidence.notes: The announcement is datelined Victoria, Seychelles on April 13, 2023 and identifies the Liechtenstein legal entity receiving the registration.

evidence.title: Official exchange platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the active exchange platform.
